temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in a dimly lit, high-tech environment. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a dark suit, a light-colored shirt, and a patterned tie. A thin black wire is visible, running from behind his ear. His expression is one of intense concentration and concern as he looks slightly off-camera. In the top left corner of the screen, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in white. The background is a blur of cool-toned, metallic surfaces. The audio begins with the distinct, rapid clicking of a computer keyboard, creating a sense of focused, technological activity. The camera cuts to a view of a computer monitor in a dark control room. The monitor displays a grainy, black-and-white security camera feed. The feed shows a dark, industrial-looking space with a bright light source in the background. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. Suddenly, a sharp, percussive sound, like a gunshot or a loud bang, cuts through the air. Immediately following this, an intense and aggressive electronic rock track erupts. The music is characterized by a heavy, driving drum beat and a powerful, distorted guitar riff, creating a high-energy, action-packed, and suspenseful atmosphere. The camera zooms in slightly on the security camera footage. The view is now a closer shot of a sleek, black car parked in what appears to be a garage or a secure area. A small, red and white triangular warning sign is visible on the ground near the car. The "风行网" text is still present in the top left corner. The shot is slightly shaky, suggesting it's being viewed on a monitor in a moving or unstable environment.
